form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.16) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 11 starts. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (30.31) over 530m at Angle Park. Deserves a win and gets his chance.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes last time with a fast early sectional but swallowed up late, finishing fourth (29.48) at Sandown and bringing a two run winning streak to an end. Brought a two-run winning streak to an end last time when outside the placings. Worth another try.

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Mt Gambier but the start prior was an easy winner after leading throughout, scoring by 6 lengths in a Grade 5 at Mt Gambier and clocking a dazzling 29.29 over the 512m trip. Will need to find best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Sandown over 515m in 29.73. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 515m at Sandown at SE level. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.04) over 520m at this track. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.
